features.evidence: Inner display was fine Had to return due to the wifi/Bluetooth cable in the hinge being unfunctional, front screen came scraped from the top to bottom on the left half of screen.

Battery is at 97% which is better than I expected. The battery is holding a charge for a very long time, no visible blemishes without pulling out the magnifying glass, it wasn't locked to any particular carrier, and it performs at the level of new flagship phones.
Excellent condition great price This was the best value for the best version of the phone.

There was also dirt on the body I had to clean off so the phone wasn't even properly cleaned. Overall this Phone should have been sold as a refurbished - good rating at the MOST due to all the scratches on the body and screen,

the dirty/smudgy inside camera lenses is unforgivable as I would have to take it to a repair shop and pay money to have them remove and replace the lenses if I want that fixed, or risk doing it myself. Camera is literally unusable.
